parameters.formDescription: Scrape Amazon listings via Firecrawl and analyse with Claude

values.placeholder: Comma-separated ASINs e.g. B0GTQQNVVZ,B09XYZ or category URL

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status:'complete', report_path: j.filepath, report_size_bytes: j.reportLength, message:`Report saved to ${j.filepath}` } }];

_meta.notes: Amazon scraping blocked by bot protection — scrape_error is gracefully handled. Analysis falls back to general KDP market knowledge. To enable real scraping, configure Firecrawl with residential proxies.
